allow: Bash(curl -s -w '\\nPOST initialize status: %{http_code}\\n' -X POST https://n8n-agent.zentropylabs.com/mcp/get_positions -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0"}},"id":0}')
